## Source: amazon-inspector (5bf0b2245dd636268ec39543616b01a112a5fefdcd1e0bb3871253c9d6c66f16)
The package @pluxee-connect/account-db-api-client was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (b7d101dbff5c071f3bab34e97f3d340e0b52caa00e38ef82e630864d44a7dce3)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@pluxee-connect/account-db-api-client' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
